% Auto-generated source-truth intake stub for ID11391.
\tzpentry{ID11391}{Hyperbolic Phase-Separation Profiles}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
Breathing and topological phases can be modeled by complementary tanh interface profiles.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\phi_{E}(s)=\frac{1}{2}\left[1+\tanh(s/\ell)\right],\qquad \phi_{T}(s)=\frac{1}{2}\left[1-\tanh(s/\ell)\right]
\paragraph{Registry Metadata.}
UUID: \texttt{59e890ce-cb0f-55b1-af07-41200a5c0e95}. PiID: \texttt{PiID-11391-portal-breathing}. LOC: \texttt{QC - Physics}. arXiv: \texttt{physics.gen-ph}.
